title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
